name: Frond
description: Single leaves veined down the middle, the blade turning to a new quarter on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 84%; height: 84%; margin: 8%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: 0 100% 0 100%; -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 8%; top: 48%; width: 84%; height: 5%; background: var(--color0); -webkit-transform: rotate(45deg); transform: rotate(45deg); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
